productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men White Phaedra Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteThe adidas Phaedra derives it's name from Greek mythology and the word means 'bright'. Now that's something that this shoe definitely brings to the table. Wear this for a quick workout session, a weekend catch-up at a cafe or a coffee date - you're guaranteed to look good.Product DetailsWhite mesh upper with perforated synthetic overlays with a round toed style, has 3 silver and blue stripes on the sidesadiPrene midsole in whiteadiWear outsole with grooves at the periphery, horizontal grooves and a decoupled heelMaterial and CareSynthetic, meshRemove dirt with a clean clothDo not machine wash or store under sunlight
